    20|#include <sstream>

static constexpr uint32_t kMaxPathText = 1024;

static int pathJoin(char* out, size_t outSize, const char* root, const char* leaf) {
    size_t rootLen = strlen(root), leafLen = strlen(leaf);
    bool needsSlash = rootLen > 0 && root[rootLen - 1] != '/' && root[rootLen - 1] != '\\';
    size_t totalLen = rootLen + (needsSlash ? 1 : 0) + leafLen;
    if (totalLen + 1 > outSize) return 0;
    memcpy(out, root, rootLen); size_t offset = rootLen;
    30|    if (needsSlash) out[offset++] = '/';
    memcpy(out + offset, leaf, leafLen);
    out[totalLen] = 0; return 1;
}

static bool fileExists(const char* path) { std::ifstream f(path, std::ios::binary); return f.good(); }

static std::string textureFileToken(const std::string& value) {
    std::istringstream ss(value); std::string token, last;
    while (ss >> token) last = token; return last;
    40|}

static std::string baseName(const std::string& path) {
    size_t slash = path.find_last_of("/\\");
    return slash == std::string::npos ? path : path.substr(slash + 1);
}

static bool resolveTexturePath(const char* root, const std::string& materialPath, char* out, size_t outSize) {
    std::string token = textureFileToken(materialPath);
    std::replace(token.begin(), token.end(), '\\', '/');
    50|    if (token.empty()) return false;
    if (pathJoin(out, outSize, root, token.c_str()) && fileExists(out)) return true;
    char texturesDir[kMaxPathText];
    if (pathJoin(texturesDir, sizeof(texturesDir), root, "textures")) {
        std::string name = baseName(token);
        if (pathJoin(out, outSize, texturesDir, name.c_str()) && fileExists(out)) return true;
    }
    return false;
}

    60|static void resizeRgbaNearest(const uint8_t* src, int sw, int sh, uint8_t* dst, uint32_t dw, uint32_t dh) {
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < dh; ++y) {
        int sy = std::min((int)((uint64_t)y * sh / dh), sh - 1);
        for (uint32_t x = 0; x < dw; ++x) {
            int sx = std::min((int)((uint64_t)x * sw / dw), sw - 1);
            const uint8_t* p = src + ((size_t)sy * sw + sx) * 4;
            uint8_t* q = dst + ((size_t)y * dw + x) * 4;
            q[0] = p[0]; q[1] = p[1]; q[2] = p[2]; q[3] = p[3];
        }
    }
    70|}

static void fillFallbackLayer(uint8_t* dst, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t mi) {
    uint32_t r = 190 + (mi * 29) % 50, g = 190 + (mi * 47) % 50, b = 190 + (mi * 67) % 50;
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < h; ++y)
        for (uint32_t x = 0; x < w; ++x) {
            uint8_t* p = dst + ((size_t)y * w + x) * 4;
            p[0] = (uint8_t)r; p[1] = (uint8_t)g; p[2] = (uint8_t)b; p[3] = 255;
        }
}
    80|
bool createSponzaMaterialTextures(GpuDevice device, const char* root, SponzaScene& scene, MaterialTextures& out) {
    constexpr uint32_t ls = 512;
    uint32_t lc = (uint32_t)std::max<size_t>(scene.materials.size(), 1);
    std::vector<uint8_t> px((size_t)lc * ls * ls * 4);

#include "pass_bindings.h"
#include "render/bindless_bind.h"

#include <cstdio>

using namespace rhi;

static bool bindForwardPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    10|    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;

    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "baseColorArray", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.baseColorTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "baseColorArray" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "linearSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "linearSampler" : nullptr) && ok;

    20|    const char* shadowNames[] = {"shadowMap0", "shadowMap1", "shadowMap2", "shadowMap3"};
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, shadowNames[i], res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.cascadeShadows[i],
                                           logFailures ? shadowNames[i] : nullptr) && ok;
    }

    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "shadowSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.shadowSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "shadowSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "pointLights", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "pointLights" : nullptr) && ok;
    30|    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "ssgiTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.ssgiTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "ssgiTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "ssgiSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "ssgiSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

static bool bindGbufferPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    if (!root) return false;
    40|    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "baseColorArray", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.baseColorTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "baseColorArray" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "linearSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "linearSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

    50|static bool bindSsgiPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "albedoTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneAlbedo,
                                       logFailures ? "albedoTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "normalTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneNormal,
                                       logFailures ? "normalTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    60|    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneDepth,
                                       logFailures ? "depthTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "sceneSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "sceneSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "outputTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.ssgiOutputUav,
                                       logFailures ? "outputTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

static bool bindLightCullPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
    70|{
    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "pointLights", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "pointLights" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "lightIndexBuffer", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightIndexBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "lightIndexBuffer" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneDepth,
    80|                                       logFailures ? "depthTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "depthSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

bool bindAllPassResources(DemoPipelines& pipelines, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    bool ok = true;
    ok = bindForwardPassResources(pipelines.forwardRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    90|    ok = bindGbufferPassResources(pipelines.gbufferRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    if (pipelines.ssgiRootObj)
        ok = bindSsgiPassResources(pipelines.ssgiRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    if (pipelines.lightCullRootObj)
        ok = bindLightCullPassResources(pipelines.lightCullRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    return ok;
}

#include "sponza_loader.h"

static std::string trim(const std::string& s) {
    size_t start = s.find_first_not_of(" \t\r\n");
    if (start == std::string::npos) return "";
    size_t end = s.find_last_not_of(" \t\r\n");
    return s.substr(start, end - start + 1);
}

static uint32_t addMaterial(SponzaScene& scene, const std::string& name) {
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < (uint32_t)scene.materials.size(); ++i)
    20|        if (scene.materials[i].name == name) return i;
    SponzaMaterial m; m.name = name; scene.materials.push_back(m);
    return (uint32_t)scene.materials.size() - 1;
}

bool parseMtl(const char* path, SponzaScene& scene) {
    std::ifstream file(path); if (!file) return false;
    std::string line; uint32_t cur = UINT32_MAX;
    while (std::getline(file, line)) {
        line = trim(line); if (line.empty() || line[0] == '#') continue;
    30|        std::istringstream ss(line); std::string tag; ss >> tag;
        if (tag == "newmtl") { std::string name; ss >> name; cur = addMaterial(scene, name); }
        else if (tag == "map_Kd" && cur != UINT32_MAX) { std::string rest; std::getline(ss, rest); scene.materials[cur].baseColor = trim(rest); }
        else if ((tag == "map_bump" || tag == "bump") && cur != UINT32_MAX) { std::string rest; std::getline(ss, rest); scene.materials[cur].normal = trim(rest); }
    }
    return true;
}

struct ObjKey { int p, t, n; uint32_t m; bool operator==(const ObjKey& o) const { return p == o.p && t == o.t && n == o.n && m == o.m; } };
struct ObjKeyHash { size_t operator()(const ObjKey& k) const { uint64_t h = 1469598103934665603ull; auto mix = [&](uint32_t v) { h = (h ^ v) * 1099511628211ull; }; mix((uint32_t)k.p); mix((uint32_t)k.t); mix((uint32_t)k.n); mix(k.m); return (size_t)h; } };
    40|
static int resolveObjIndex(int idx, int count) { return idx > 0 ? idx - 1 : idx < 0 ? count + idx : -1; }

bool parseObj(const char* path, SponzaScene& scene) {
    std::ifstream file(path); if (!file) return false;
    std::vector<Vec3> positions, normals;

    uint32_t activeMat = addMaterial(scene, "default");

_**Agent**_

根因是 bindless 下 `Texture2DArray.Handle` + 独立 `SamplerState` 无法用 `SampleLevel` 正确采样；应改用 `Sampler2DArray` 组合句柄。

+uint32_t gpuBindlessAllocateCombinedTextureView(GpuBindlessHeap heap, GpuHandle viewHandle)
+{
+    if (!heap || heap->descriptorType != GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_TEXTURE || !viewHandle.index) return UINT32_MAX;
+
+    uint32_t index = heap->allocator.allocate();
+    if (index == UINT32_MAX || index >= heap->records.size()) return UINT32_MAX;
+
+    auto* view = heap->device->textureViewPool.resolve(viewHandle.index, viewHandle.generation);
+    if (!view) {
+        heap->allocator.free(index);
+        return UINT32_MAX;
+    }
+
+    GpuBindlessRecord record = {};
+    record.occupied = true;
+    record.isTextureView = true;
+    record.resource = viewHandle;
+    record.textureView = view;
+    if (SLANG_FAILED(view->getCombinedTextureSamplerDescriptorHandle(&record.descriptor)) ||
+        record.descriptor.type != rhi::DescriptorHandleType::CombinedTextureSampler) {
+        heap->allocator.free(index);
+        return UINT32_MAX;
+    }
+
+    heap->records[index] = record;
+
+    {
+        auto key = ((uint64_t)viewHandle.index << 32) | viewHandle.generation;
+        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(heap->device->bindlessMutex);
+        heap->device->bindlessResourceMap[key] = {heap, index};
+    }
+
+    return index;
+}

#include "pass_bindings.h"
#include "render/bindless_bind.h"

#include <cstdio>

using namespace rhi;

static bool bindForwardPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    10|    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;

    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "baseColorArray", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.baseColorTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "baseColorArray" : nullptr) && ok;

    const char* shadowNames[] = {"shadowMap0", "shadowMap1", "shadowMap2", "shadowMap3"};
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
    20|        ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, shadowNames[i], res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.cascadeShadows[i],
                                           logFailures ? shadowNames[i] : nullptr) && ok;
    }

    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "shadowSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.shadowSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "shadowSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "pointLights", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "pointLights" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "ssgiTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.ssgiTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "ssgiTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    30|    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "ssgiSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "ssgiSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

static bool bindGbufferPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    40|    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "baseColorArray", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.baseColorTexture,
                                       logFailures ? "baseColorArray" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

static bool bindSsgiPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    50|    ShaderCursor c(root);
    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "albedoTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneAlbedo,
                                       logFailures ? "albedoTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "normalTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneNormal,
                                       logFailures ? "normalTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneDepth,
                                       logFailures ? "depthTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "sceneSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "sceneSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    60|    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "outputTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.ssgiOutputUav,
                                       logFailures ? "outputTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
}

static bool bindLightCullPassResources(rhi::IShaderObject* root, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    if (!root) return false;
    const RenderResources& res = *frame.resources;
    ShaderCursor c(root);
    70|    bool ok = true;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "pointLights", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "pointLights" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "lightIndexBuffer", res.bufferBindlessHeap, res.bindless.lightIndexBuffer,
                                       logFailures ? "lightIndexBuffer" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthTexture", res.textureBindlessHeap, res.bindless.sceneDepth,
                                       logFailures ? "depthTexture" : nullptr) && ok;
    ok = shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "depthSampler", res.samplerBindlessHeap, res.bindless.linearSampler,
                                       logFailures ? "depthSampler" : nullptr) && ok;
    return ok;
    80|}

bool bindAllPassResources(DemoPipelines& pipelines, const FrameData& frame, bool logFailures)
{
    bool ok = true;
    ok = bindForwardPassResources(pipelines.forwardRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    ok = bindGbufferPassResources(pipelines.gbufferRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    if (pipelines.ssgiRootObj)
        ok = bindSsgiPassResources(pipelines.ssgiRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    if (pipelines.lightCullRootObj)
    90|        ok = bindLightCullPassResources(pipelines.lightCullRootObj.get(), frame, logFailures) && ok;
    return ok;
}

_**Agent**_

已定位并修复 albedo 全黑问题。

## 原因

在 D3D12 bindless 下，`Texture2DArray.Handle` + 独立 `SamplerState.Handle` **不能**用 `SampleLevel(sampler, ...)` 正确采样（slang-rhi 的 bindless 测试里 `Texture2DArray` 只用 `[]` 索引读取，带滤波的采样要走 **Combined Texture Sampler** 路径）。

之前写法相当于 bindless 句柄无效，采样结果一直是 0 → albedo 视图全黑。

## 修复

1. **Shader**（`forward.slang` / `gbuffer.slang`）  
   - `Texture2DArray` + `linearSampler` → `Sampler2DArray<float4>.Handle baseColorArray`  
   - 采样改为：`baseColorArray.SampleLevel(float3(frac(uv), layer), 0)`

2. **材质纹理**（`material_textures.cpp`）  
   - 创建带 sampler 的 texture view（`createView` + `viewDesc.sampler`），供 combined handle 使用

3. **Bindless 注册**（`render_resources.cpp`）  
   - 新增 `gpuBindlessAllocateCombinedTextureView()`，用 `getCombinedTextureSamplerDescriptorHandle` 注册 baseColor

4. **绑定**（`pass_bindings.cpp`）  
   - forward/gbuffer 只绑一个 `baseColorArray` combined 句柄，不再单独绑 `linearSampler`

请重新编译运行验证：

```powershell
cd G:\work\tech\infra\gpu\build\examples\Debug
.\24_sponza_graph.exe --features base,nofog --view-mode albedo
```

`albedo` 模式应能看到石砖纹理；`material` 模式应显示彩色材质层索引。若仍不对，告诉我当前是整屏黑、纯灰，还是只有部分区域有问题。

---

[shader("fragment")]
float4 fragmentMain(VSOut input, bool isFrontFace : SV_IsFrontFace) : SV_Target
{
    float3 n = safeNormalize(input.normal);
    if (!isFrontFace)
        n = -n;

   250|    float3 viewDir = safeNormalize(gFwd.camera.cameraPos - input.worldPos);

    float maxLayer = max((float)gFwd.baseColorLayerCount, 1.0) - 1.0;
    float layer = clamp(round(input.material), 0.0, maxLayer);
    float3 albedo = baseColorArray.SampleLevel(float3(frac(input.uv), layer), 0).rgb;
    albedo = max(albedo, 0.001);

    float3 ambientTerm = albedo * gFwd.lighting.ambientColor;

    float3 lightDir = safeNormalize(-gFwd.lighting.dirLightDir);
   260|    float ndl = saturate(dot(n, lightDir));
    float dirShadow = 1.0;
    if (gFwd.features.enableDirShadow != 0u)
    {
        float4 shadowPos[4] = { input.shadowPos0, input.shadowPos1, input.shadowPos2, input.shadowPos3 };
        dirShadow = evaluateDirShadow(shadowPos, input.viewDepth, n, lightDir);
    }

    float3 diffuseTerm = float3(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    float3 specularTerm = float3(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
   270|    if (gFwd.features.enableDirLight != 0u)
    {
        diffuseTerm = albedo * gFwd.lighting.dirLightColor * gFwd.lighting.dirLightIntensity * ndl * dirShadow;
        float3 halfDir = safeNormalize(lightDir + viewDir);
        float spec = pow(saturate(dot(n, halfDir)), 48.0) * dirShadow;
        specularTerm = gFwd.lighting.dirLightColor * gFwd.lighting.dirLightIntensity * spec;
    }

    float3 pointTerm = evalPointLights(albedo, n, input.worldPos);

   280|    float3 giTerm = float3(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    if (gFwd.features.enableSSGI != 0u)
        giTerm = sampleSSGI(input.position) * 0.25;

    float3 color = ambientTerm + diffuseTerm + pointTerm + giTerm;

    if (gFwd.features.enableFog != 0u)
    {
        float fog = saturate(input.viewDepth / 2600.0);
        color = lerp(color, float3(0.055, 0.065, 0.085), fog);
   290|    }

    color = max(color, albedo * 0.02);

    uint mode = gFwd.debugViewMode;
    if (mode == kViewAlbedo)
        color = albedo;
    else if (mode == kViewAmbient)
        color = ambientTerm;
    else if (mode == kViewDiffuse)
   300|        color = diffuseTerm;
    else if (mode == kViewSpecular)
        color = specularTerm;
    else if (mode == kViewPointLights)
        color = pointTerm;
    else if (mode == kViewSSGI)
        color = giTerm;
    else if (mode == kViewShadow)
        color = float3(dirShadow, dirShadow, dirShadow);
    else if (mode == kViewNormal)
   310|        color = n * 0.5 + 0.5;
    else if (mode == kViewDepth)
    {
        float d = saturate(input.viewDepth / gFwd.camera.zParams.y);
        color = float3(d, d, d);
    }
    else if (mode == kViewNdotL)
        color = float3(ndl, ndl, ndl);
    else if (mode == kViewUV)
    {
   320|        float2 uvv = frac(input.uv);
        color = float3(uvv.x, uvv.y, frac(uvv.x * 0.37 + uvv.y * 0.61));
    }
    else if (mode == kViewMaterial)
    {
        float t = layer / max(maxLayer, 1.0);
        color = float3(frac(t), frac(t * 2.13), frac(t * 4.71));
    }
    else if (mode == kViewDirect)
        color = max(diffuseTerm + pointTerm, albedo * 0.02);
   330|    else if (mode == kViewLighting)
        color = max(ambientTerm + diffuseTerm + pointTerm, albedo * 0.02);

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}
